productDisplayName: Nike Men Free Run +2 Grey Sports Shoes
description: If it's unending speed you're looking for, there's no better running shoe than the nike Free Run 2. A perfect cross-country shoe, the Free Run 2 is employed with DryFit technology that allows water to drain away, keeping your feet dry and comfortable even in wet conditions.UpperOne-piece, single-layer open-mesh upper for lightweight comfort and breathability Allows water to drain away keeping the feet dry and fresh even in wet conditionsInternal arch bandage locks down the foot offering a snug, secure Fit and optimal power transferCollar lobes provide a snug fit for ultimate heel lock downSynthetic overlays for zonal support in the heel and toe box for a snug fit without adding unnecessary weightSublimated design on mesh gives a fresh feel without adding to the weightNo-sew construction and eyestays limit internal stitching to reduce friction and foot irritationMidsoleRemovable cushioned footbed to accommodate an orthoticEVA injected midsole for lightweight feelOutsoleUnique tip to heel TPR outsole with multi-directional lugs for optimal traction on various surfaces Vertical and horizontal flex grooves for added cushioning and flexibility while runningShoe careWipe surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
